title: Quiz 1 and First Scene Cleanup

video.note: Review range only; no new required tutorial segment.

learningTarget: I can show what I remember from Lessons 01-04 and improve my first Unreal scene using feedback, organization, and stronger evidence screenshots.

bellRinger.prompt: Which Unreal tool or shortcut from Lessons 01-04 helped you the most so far, and why?

vocabulary.definition: A focused check of earlier skills and vocabulary so you know what is solid and what still needs practice.
Information from a teacher, peer, rubric, or self-check that helps you decide what to improve.
A purposeful change that makes the work clearer, stronger, or more complete.
A screenshot, file, or written explanation that proves a skill was used.
A polished image of work that could be used later to show growth or achievement.

slides.title: Lesson 05 - Quiz 1 and First Scene Cleanup

assignment.title: First Scene Cleanup and Evidence Upgrade
evidenceRequired: Short reflection naming at least three tools or shortcuts.
Optional quiz completion screenshot or teacher checkoff.

exitTicket: What is one improvement you made to your first Unreal scene today?
